'''gogalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:vegan|vegan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-g-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vegan|vegan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gogalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogalithi|gogalithi]] || [[word:gogaliji|gogaliji]] || [[word:gogalishi|gogalishi]] || [[word:gogaliki|gogaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogaluthuthu|gogaluthuthu]] || [[word:gogalujuju|gogalujuju]] || [[word:gogalushushu|gogalushushu]] || [[word:gogalukuku|gogalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogaluthu|gogaluthu]] || [[word:gogaluju|gogaluju]] || [[word:gogalushu|gogalushu]] || [[word:gogaluku|gogaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogalufthuf|gogalufthuf]] || [[word:gogalufjuf|gogalufjuf]] || [[word:gogalufshuf|gogalufshuf]] || [[word:gogalufkuf|gogalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogalethe|gogalethe]] || [[word:gogaleje|gogaleje]] || [[word:gogaleshe|gogaleshe]] || [[word:gogaleke|gogaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogalothotho|gogalothotho]] || [[word:gogalojojo|gogalojojo]] || [[word:gogaloshosho|gogaloshosho]] || [[word:gogalokoko|gogalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogalotho|gogalotho]] || [[word:gogalojo|gogalojo]] || [[word:gogalosho|gogalosho]] || [[word:gogaloko|gogaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogalofthof|gogalofthof]] || [[word:gogalofjof|gogalofjof]] || [[word:gogalofshof|gogalofshof]] || [[word:gogalofkof|gogalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfthÃŸf|gogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfjÃŸf|gogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfshÃŸf|gogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfkÃŸf|gogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|gogalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|gogalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|gogalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|gogalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfthÃŸf|gogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfjÃŸf|gogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfshÃŸf|gogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfkÃŸf|gogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfthÃŸf|gogalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfjÃŸf|gogalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfshÃŸf|gogalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:gogalÃŸfkÃŸf|gogalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gogalÃḊthÃḊ|gogalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:gogalÃḊjÃḊ|gogalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:gogalÃḊshÃḊ|gogalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:gogalÃḊkÃḊ|gogalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gogalathatha|gogalathatha]] || [[word:gogalajaja|gogalajaja]] || [[word:gogalashasha|gogalashasha]] || [[word:gogalakaka|gogalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gogalatha|gogalatha]] || [[word:gogalaja|gogalaja]] || [[word:gogalasha|gogalasha]] || [[word:gogalaka|gogalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gogalafthaf|gogalafthaf]] || [[word:gogalafjaf|gogalafjaf]] || [[word:gogalafshaf|gogalafshaf]] || [[word:gogalafkaf|gogalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gogalasha|gogalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogalshÃḋsha|gogalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogalrosha|gogalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogalmusha|gogalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogalyasha|gogalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogalnkshÃḋsha|gogogalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogalnkrosha|gogogalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogalnkmusha|gogogalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogalnkyasha|gogogalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gogagalasha|gogagalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogagalshÃḋsha|gogagalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogagalrosha|gogagalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogagalmusha|gogagalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogagalyasha|gogagalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogagalnkshÃḋsha|gogogagalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogagalnkrosha|gogogagalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogagalnkmusha|gogogagalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogagalnkyasha|gogogagalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gegÃḊlasha|gegÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gegÃḊlshÃḋsha|gegÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gegÃḊlrosha|gegÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gegÃḊlmusha|gegÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gegÃḊlyasha|gegÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogegÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|gogegÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogegÃḊlnkrosha|gogegÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogegÃḊlnkmusha|gogegÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogegÃḊlnkyasha|gogegÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gogfalasha|gogfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gogfalshÃḋsha|gogfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogfalrosha|gogfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogfalmusha|gogfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogfalyasha|gogfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogogfalnkshÃḋsha|gogogfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogogfalnkrosha|gogogfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogogfalnkmusha|gogogfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogogfalnkyasha|gogogfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
